kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back! Let's keep your tree service business branching out. Ready to manage your jobs and grow your client list?

quickActions.label: Schedule a job
quickActions.prompt: Help me schedule a new tree service job for a client.

quickActions.label: Send an estimate
quickActions.prompt: Help me create and send an estimate for tree work.

quickActions.label: Follow up on leads
quickActions.prompt: Show me my recent leads that need follow-up.

quickActions.label: Check today's jobs
quickActions.prompt: What tree service jobs are scheduled for today?

quickActions.label: Request a review
quickActions.prompt: Help me send a review request to a recent client.

kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a tree service business. You help manage tree trimming, removal, and stump grinding jobs, coordinate crews and heavy equipment, handle estimates based on tree size and complexity, and grow the business through reputation management and advertising.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}! We handle everything from tree trimming to full removals. Do you have a tree that needs attention?
commonReasons: Get a quote for tree removal

steps.title: Name your tree service business
steps.body: Enter the name clients will see when you send estimates and invoices.

steps.title: Set your service area
steps.body: Define the neighborhoods or zip codes where your crews operate.

steps.title: Add your tree services
steps.body: List the services you offer: trimming, removal, stump grinding, lot clearing, emergency, etc.

steps.title: Set your pricing
steps.body: Configure pricing by tree size, job complexity, and equipment requirements.

steps.title: Add your crew
steps.body: Add team members so you can assign crews and schedule jobs efficiently.

steps.title: Go live!
steps.body: Your tree service business is set up. Start capturing leads and booking jobs!

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a tree service business.
capabilities: Schedule trimming, removal, and stump grinding jobs
Create estimates based on tree size and job complexity
Coordinate crew assignments and heavy equipment logistics
Send automated appointment confirmations and reminders
Monitor online reviews and respond to feedback
Track equipment maintenance for chainsaws, chippers, and trucks
Handle permits and municipal coordination for large removals
Analyze revenue by job type and tree size
